title: Mere Mehboob Qayamat Hogi
info:
Lyrics: Mere mehboob qayamat hogi
Aaj rusva teri galiyon mein mohabbat hogi
Naam niklega tera hi lab se
Baat niklegi to har su teri shohrat hogi
Mere mehboob qayamat hogi
Aaj rusva teri galiyon mein mohabbat hogi

Meri mit jayegi hasti teri chahat mein
Aur tarasogi tum meri mohabbat mein
Mere mehboob qayamat hogi
Aaj rusva teri galiyon mein mohabbat hogi

Mere sanam bewafa ho tum
Jo wada kiya tha nibha na sake
Mere sanam bewafa ho tum
Jo wada kiya tha nibha na sake
Ek mehfil mein aakar
Phir kabhi tanha na sake
Mere mehboob qayamat hogi
Aaj rusva teri galiyon mein mohabbat hogi

lines.indian: Dha Ni Sa' Ga' Re' Ga': Re' Sa' Ni Dha Pa Dha Dha Pa Ni
Dha Ni Sa' Ni Dha Dha Ni Ni Sa' Ni Pa
ma Pa Ga ma Dha: Ni Dha
Dha Ni Sa' Ga' Re' Ga': Re' Sa' Ni Dha Pa Dha Dha Pa Ni

lines.lyrics: Jaane jab iss dil e naakaa
lines.indian: Dha Ni Sa' Ni Dha Dha Ni Ni Sa' Ni Pa
ma Pa Ga ma Dha: Ni Dha
Dha Ni Sa' Ga' Re' Ga':
Sa' Sa' Ni Re' Sa' Ni Dha Ni Dha Dha
Sa' Sa' Ni Re' Sa' Ni Dha Ni Dha Dha

lines.lyrics: Kehnaa sitam karr kuch ahi khabar
lines.indian: Re' Re' Re' Re' Sa' Ni Dha Ni Dha Dha
Ga' Ga' Pa' ma' Ga' ma' Ga' Re'
Re' Re' ma' Ga' Re' Ga' Re' Sa'
Sa' Sa' Ga' Re' Ga' Re' Sa' Ni Re' Sa' Ni' Dha

lines.lyrics: Jisse ab tak tujhe nafrat hoogi
lines.indian: Dha Ni Sa' Ga' Re' Ga': Re' Sa' Ni Dha Pa Dha Dha Pa Ni
Dha Ni Sa' Ni Dha Dha Ni Ni Sa' Ni Pa
ma Pa Ga ma Dha Ni Dha
Dha Ni Sa' Ga' Re' Ga': Re' Sa' Ni Dha Pa Dha Dha Pa Ni
Dha Ni Sa' Ni Dha Dha Ni Ni Sa' Ni Pa
ma Pa Ga ma Dha: Ni Dha
Dha Ni Sa' Ga' Re' Ga':

description: This iconic song is a masterclass in melancholic expression, delivered with unparalleled pathos by Kishore Kumar. Its enduring appeal lies in its simple yet profound lyrics, depicting the agony of unrequited love and betrayal. Laxmikant-Pyarelal's haunting melody perfectly complements the mood, making it a timeless classic that continues to resonate with listeners across generations.
trivia: This song is one of Kishore Kumar's most celebrated and emotionally charged performances, showcasing his incredible versatility beyond his usual comedic roles.
It was composed by the legendary duo Laxmikant–Pyarelal early in their career, establishing their prowess in creating memorable melodies.
The poignant lyrics were penned by Anand Bakshi, who went on to become one of Bollywood's most prolific and successful lyricists.

Despite being from a relatively lesser-known film, 'Mr. X In Bombay', the song achieved immense popularity and remains a staple on radio and in cover versions, cementing its place in Indian music history.
